rules.name: simple_summary
rules.description: Short summarization, rewriting, or formatting tasks that do not require external knowledge or complex reasoning.

rules.name: simple_classification
rules.description: Simple label extraction or classification tasks.

rules.name: code_generation
rules.description: Code generation, debugging, security review, infrastructure design, or multi-step implementation tasks.

rules.name: complex_reasoning
rules.description: Long context, ambiguous requirements, or tasks requiring careful tradeoff analysis.
